Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Iwatodai strip mall, Wilduck Burger...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I'm starting to get[n]the hang of working here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Wow, you're looking pretty good. I would've thought you've been working here for years.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}My internship ended a little early.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I was getting hungry, so I thought I'd stop by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, I'm not looking to get on the wrong end of Ms. Toriumi's death glare.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}My internship ended a little early, so I thought I'd stop by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, looks like you've got the routine down. Maybe they'll hire you full time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}If you don't mind, uh... could we talk for a bit when you're done?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Right, you're still on the clock. Don't mind me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But... there's something that's been bothering me. Do you think we could talk in a bit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Hmm... I'll have the limited-time combo with chili garlic fries and a coffee. Oh, and one smile, please![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Jokes aside, there's actually something I wanted to talk to you about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}! Manager says to take your break.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I see you chose this place too. Well, my internship ended a little early, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}So what, you came here to rub it in my face? You better not start pickin' up chicks in here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}You are literally a chick magnet, you know that? Our sworn enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Oh, now that you're here, I'd actually like to get your opinion too, Tomochika-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}They said I should take my break now too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Look, they told me to break at the same time as you! We're both just standing around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}C'mon, this is our chance to chill. Don't even think about wiping tables![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, you two get along pretty well, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I guess I'll go order something. You guys go ahead and find a seat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Hold on, the manager hooked me up with some nuggets. Lemme go grab 'em.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Not such a bad person, once you get to know each other. Just... kinda intimidating at first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I think this should be enough for the three of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Nice, you know your junk food! Now this is what being a high schooler's all about![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}Iori? Aren't you guys doing the same internship?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Yeah... We were supposed to, but he didn't show up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Until today, that is. I finally saw him, so we talked for a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But it feels like he's forcing himself. I can see a hint of sadness when I look into his eyes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I guess I should have, but... I dunno. I couldn't bring myself to do it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It felt like he was suppressing an unbearable sadness. Like he was forcing himself to act normal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, at first glance, he looks like he's goofing off as always...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But it feels like he's forcing himself. I can see a hint of sadness when I look into his eyes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Y'know, Mochizuki... you're really starting to get on my nerves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}You're that good-looking, but you still watch out for your bros...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}You're too perfect! What are we even supposed to do about this guy, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Anyway, I dunno what's up, but I guess even Iori's not immune to getting bummed out sometimes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Guess that shouldn't be surprising... No one ever said being a teenager was easy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}He's got {f 4 1} living in the same dorm. That's a recipe for recovery for sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}{f 4 1} helped me a lot, too. I'd probably still be moping around if it wasn't for him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}So don't worry. I'm sure Iori'll bounce back in no time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Well, nothin' more to do but take him to karaoke sometime. I'll let him know you were worried about him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 158 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}I didn't even get to eat any of this. It's up to you now, Mochizuki![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, I don't think I can eat this much... Guess I'll go ask for a to-go box at the register.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}He's probably right... I'm sure Junpei-kun will be back to his cheerful self again soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Especially with you around. You're his best friend, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha... I know I'm the one who asked, but I feel a little awkward hearing that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, after how well you two get along? I think you guys make a good duo.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I have to admit, I'm a little jealous. I never really had someone like that before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Seeing Junpei-kun like that had me worried about you as well... But I guess you're doing just fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}...Sorry, I didn't mean to drag this on so long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}See you later, {f 4 2}-kun. Good luck on the rest of your shift.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji left, and I got back to work...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With the four days of internship[n]done, I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
